summary: Iteration 174 - Comprehensive Mobile Audit (390x844 viewport). ALL 22 pages tested - NO horizontal overflow detected on any page. Mobile navigation bar working correctly. Mira FAB opens chat widget. Cart functionality works. All 14 pillars render correctly on mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: All pages have overflow-x-hidden class in App.js MainLayout preventing horizontal scroll
MobileNavBar.jsx correctly shows 5 buttons: Home, Services, Mira FAB, Orders, Profile
Footer.jsx has mobile-specific AI disclaimer at lines 196-203
MiraChatWidget.jsx is responsive with mobile-first design (h-[85vh] on mobile, full height on desktop)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full mobile audit completed. All pages working correctly on mobile viewport 390x844. No horizontal overflow issues. Mobile nav bar, Mira FAB, cart sidebar all functional.

home.notes: Hero section, pillars grid, mobile nav bar all render correctly

login.notes: Login form with email/password inputs, Google sign-in button, all tappable

register.notes: Registration form with name, email, phone, password fields

shop.notes: 615 products, 2-column grid, filters, category tabs, Add to Cart works

product_detail.notes: Product image, price, description, Add to Cart button

mira.notes: Full-page chat with welcome message, quick actions, input field

celebrate.notes: Pillar page with hero, services, products

care.notes: 6 booking buttons found, mobile nav bar visible

enjoy.notes: Adventures page with Find Experiences, Browse Events buttons

paperwork.notes: Your Dog's Complete Life File page

emergency.notes: 24/7 Emergency Support with hotline, Report Emergency button

farewell.notes: Honouring the Bond page with support options

adopt.notes: Adopt Don't Shop page with stats (8 Pets, 4 Shelters)

occasion_box.notes: 4-step wizard, Birthday Box builder with cake selection grid

mobile_nav_bar.notes: All 5 buttons visible, Mira FAB opens chat widget

mira_chat_widget.notes: Opens from Mira FAB, responsive design (85vh on mobile), voice listening works

cart_sidebar.notes: Opens on Add to Cart, shows item count, subtotal, shipping progress, checkout button

footer_ai_disclaimer.notes: Visible on mobile: 'Mira is powered by AI and can make mistakes. Learn more'

footer_collapsible_sections.notes: Explore Pillars, Intelligence, Contact Us sections with chevron icons
